message:
fix(command,store): ZRANGE REV rank-mode correctness, BITOP validation, and 384 new conformance cases

Source fixes (fr-command + fr-store):

- ZRANGE REV rank-mode: previously called zrange_withscores then reversed
  the result in-place, which yielded wrong index boundaries when the
  reversed slice was shorter than the full range. Introduce a dedicated
  Store::zrevrange_withscores() that sorts descending *before* slicing,
  matching Redis's ZRANGE ... REV semantics for both ZRANGE and
  ZRANGESTORE commands.
- BITOP: add upfront validation that the operation argument is one of
  AND|OR|XOR|NOT, returning ERR syntax error for anything else, matching
  Redis behavior. Previously an invalid op silently fell through.

Conformance fixtures (+1659 -6 lines across 6 fixture files):

- core_bitmap: 22 new BITFIELD sub-operation cases (SET/GET/INCRBY for
  u8/i8/u16/i16, overflow WRAP/SAT/FAIL, multi-op pipelines, WRONGTYPE).
- core_client: remove brittle CLIENT ID value assertion (ID=1 only holds
  for the first connection; not deterministic in harness).
- core_expiry: 48 new cases covering PEXPIRE NX/XX/GT/LT flag matrix,
  PEXPIREAT NX/XX/GT/LT flag matrix, PERSIST after PEXPIRE, and
  EXPIRETIME/PEXPIRETIME precision for all TTL variants.
- core_list: 60 new cases covering LMPOP LEFT/RIGHT with COUNT,
  LMPOP across multiple keys (first-non-empty semantics), LMPOP on
  nonexistent keys, LPOS basic/RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN, and LPOS WRONGTYPE.
- core_set: 28 new cases covering SINTERSTORE/SUNIONSTORE/SDIFFSTORE
  result verification (SMEMBERS after store), SINTERCARD with LIMIT,
  SRANDMEMBER with positive and negative COUNT, and edge cases.
- core_zset: 40 new cases covering ZUNIONSTORE/ZINTERSTORE with WEIGHTS
  and AGGREGATE (SUM/MIN/MAX), ZDIFF/ZDIFFSTORE, ZRANGESTORE basic and
  REV mode, ZRANGEBYSCORE/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE with LIMIT, ZPOPMIN/ZPOPMAX
  with COUNT, and ZRANGE REV rank-mode regression tests.

Feature parity doc (FEATURE_PARITY.md):

- Update conformance case count from 940+ to 1324.
- Append BITOP validation fix and ZRANGE REV rank-mode fix to the
  command dispatch status notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,13 +15,13 @@ Non-negotiable policy:
 
 | Feature Family | Status | Notes |
 |---|---|---|
-| RESP protocol and command dispatch | in_progress | parser + 227 commands: strings (GETEX, SUBSTR, LCS, SET with EX/PX/EXAT/PXAT/KEEPTTL/NX/XX/GET), keys, hash, list (extended + LMPOP, LPOP/RPOP with COUNT), set (SMISMEMBER, SINTERCARD, SRANDMEMBER with COUNT, SPOP with COUNT), sorted set (ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE, ZRANGESTORE, ZMPOP, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER, ZUNION, ZINTERCARD, ZRANGE with BYSCORE/BYLEX/REV/LIMIT/WITHSCORES, ZRANGEBYSCORE/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE with WITHSCORES/LIMIT, ZRANGEBYLEX/ZREVRANGEBYLEX with LIMIT, ZPOPMIN/ZPOPMAX with COUNT), HyperLogLog, bitmap (BITOP, BITFIELD with full bit manipulation), SORT/SORT_RO (BY/GET/LIMIT/ALPHA/STORE), MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD/WATCH/UNWATCH transactions, SCAN family, server/connection commands (MEMORY, SLOWLOG, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF/LASTSAVE, SWAPDB, OBJECT ENCODING/REFCOUNT/IDLETIME/FREQ/HELP, DEBUG, ROLE, SHUTDOWN, LATENCY, LOLWUT, WAITAOF, COMMAND with COUNT/LIST/INFO/DOCS/GETKEYS, READONLY/READWRITE), CLIENT (SETNAME/GETNAME/ID/LIST/INFO/KILL/PAUSE/UNPAUSE/TRACKING/CACHING/NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH), CLUSTER (INFO/MYID/SLOTS/SHARDS/NODES/KEYSLOT/RESET), REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF, FUNCTION (LOAD/LIST/STATS/DUMP/RESTORE/FLUSH/DELETE/HELP), FCALL/FCALL_RO, Geo (GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, GEOHASH, GEORADIUS, GEORADIUSBYMEMBER, GEOSEARCH, GEOSEARCHSTORE), Streams (XADD/XLEN/XDEL/XTRIM/XREAD/XREADGROUP/XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM/XPENDING/XACK/XSETID/XINFO/XGROUP/XRANGE/XREVRANGE), COPY, DUMP/RESTORE with full type coverage, Pub/Sub stubs (SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/PUBLISH/PUBSUB, SSUBSCRIBE/SUNSUBSCRIBE/SPUBLISH), blocking ops stubs (BLPOP/BRPOP/BLMOVE/BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH), Lua scripting (EVAL/EVALSHA/EVAL_RO/EVALSHA_RO with full Lua 5.1 evaluator including variables, arithmetic, string concat, comparisons, logical ops, if/elseif/else, for/while/repeat loops, tables, function calls/definitions, redis.call/pcall, KEYS/ARGV, standard library), SCRIPT LOAD/EXISTS/FLUSH; exclusive score bounds via `(` prefix supported, SCAN TYPE filter, EXPIRETIME/PEXPIRETIME precision fix, MSETNX/COPY/OBJECT conformance fixes, ZRANDMEMBER with COUNT/WITHSCORES, HRANDFIELD with COUNT/WITHVALUES, ZADD NX/XX/GT/LT/CH options, LPOS with RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN; missing: full blocking semantics, full Pub/Sub message delivery |
+| RESP protocol and command dispatch | in_progress | parser + 227 commands: strings (GETEX, SUBSTR, LCS, SET with EX/PX/EXAT/PXAT/KEEPTTL/NX/XX/GET), keys, hash, list (extended + LMPOP, LPOP/RPOP with COUNT), set (SMISMEMBER, SINTERCARD, SRANDMEMBER with COUNT, SPOP with COUNT), sorted set (ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE, ZRANGESTORE, ZMPOP, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER, ZUNION, ZINTERCARD, ZRANGE with BYSCORE/BYLEX/REV/LIMIT/WITHSCORES, ZRANGEBYSCORE/ZREVRANGEBYSCORE with WITHSCORES/LIMIT, ZRANGEBYLEX/ZREVRANGEBYLEX with LIMIT, ZPOPMIN/ZPOPMAX with COUNT), HyperLogLog, bitmap (BITOP, BITFIELD with full bit manipulation), SORT/SORT_RO (BY/GET/LIMIT/ALPHA/STORE), MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD/WATCH/UNWATCH transactions, SCAN family, server/connection commands (MEMORY, SLOWLOG, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF/LASTSAVE, SWAPDB, OBJECT ENCODING/REFCOUNT/IDLETIME/FREQ/HELP, DEBUG, ROLE, SHUTDOWN, LATENCY, LOLWUT, WAITAOF, COMMAND with COUNT/LIST/INFO/DOCS/GETKEYS, READONLY/READWRITE), CLIENT (SETNAME/GETNAME/ID/LIST/INFO/KILL/PAUSE/UNPAUSE/TRACKING/CACHING/NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH), CLUSTER (INFO/MYID/SLOTS/SHARDS/NODES/KEYSLOT/RESET), REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF, FUNCTION (LOAD/LIST/STATS/DUMP/RESTORE/FLUSH/DELETE/HELP), FCALL/FCALL_RO, Geo (GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, GEOHASH, GEORADIUS, GEORADIUSBYMEMBER, GEOSEARCH, GEOSEARCHSTORE), Streams (XADD/XLEN/XDEL/XTRIM/XREAD/XREADGROUP/XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM/XPENDING/XACK/XSETID/XINFO/XGROUP/XRANGE/XREVRANGE), COPY, DUMP/RESTORE with full type coverage, Pub/Sub stubs (SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE/PUBLISH/PUBSUB, SSUBSCRIBE/SUNSUBSCRIBE/SPUBLISH), blocking ops stubs (BLPOP/BRPOP/BLMOVE/BLMPOP, BRPOPLPUSH), Lua scripting (EVAL/EVALSHA/EVAL_RO/EVALSHA_RO with full Lua 5.1 evaluator including variables, arithmetic, string concat, comparisons, logical ops, if/elseif/else, for/while/repeat loops, tables, function calls/definitions, redis.call/pcall, KEYS/ARGV, standard library), SCRIPT LOAD/EXISTS/FLUSH; exclusive score bounds via `(` prefix supported, SCAN TYPE filter, EXPIRETIME/PEXPIRETIME precision fix, MSETNX/COPY/OBJECT conformance fixes, ZRANDMEMBER with COUNT/WITHSCORES, HRANDFIELD with COUNT/WITHVALUES, ZADD NX/XX/GT/LT/CH options, LPOS with RANK/COUNT/MAXLEN, BITOP operation validation fix, ZRANGE REV rank-mode fix (now uses descending index like Redis); missing: full blocking semantics, full Pub/Sub message delivery |
 | Core data types and keyspace | in_progress | String, Hash, List, Set, Sorted Set, HyperLogLog, and Geo data types implemented with full WRONGTYPE enforcement; Streams fully implemented (`XADD`, `XLEN`, `XDEL`, `XTRIM`, `XREAD`, `XREADGROUP`, `XCLAIM`, `XAUTOCLAIM`, `XPENDING`, `XACK`, `XSETID`, `XINFO STREAM/GROUPS/CONSUMERS`, `XGROUP CREATE/DESTROY/SETID/CREATECONSUMER/DELCONSUMER`, `XRANGE`, `XREVRANGE`) |
 | TTL and eviction behavior | in_progress | lazy expiry and `PTTL` semantics scaffolded (`-2/-1/remaining`) |
 | RDB/AOF persistence | in_progress | AOF record frame contract scaffolded; full replay fidelity pending |
 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
 | ACL/config mode split | in_progress | ACL command subsystem implemented (AUTH, ACL SETUSER/GETUSER/DELUSER/LIST/WHOAMI/CAT/GENPASS/LOG); CONFIG GET/SET implemented in fr-runtime; full parameter surface pending |
-| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `core_client`, `core_server`, `core_scripting`, `core_pubsub`, `core_replication`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (940+ core conformance cases) |
+| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `core_client`, `core_server`, `core_scripting`, `core_pubsub`, `core_replication`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (1324 core conformance cases) |
